name: First Guaranty Bancshares, Inc.
business: First Guaranty Bancshares is a financial holding company. Its subsidiary, First Guaranty Bank provides commercial banking services to customers in Louisiana, Texas, Kentucky, and West Virginia. The company generates revenue from interest on loans and securities, and from service charges and fees.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in Louisiana, Texas, Kentucky, and West Virginia

exposures.sentence: At December 31, 2025, approximately $69.2 million, or 3.3% of our total loan portfolio was comprised of loans to businesses engaged in support or service activities for oil and gas operations.

catalysts.event: Sale of Texas operations to Armstrong Bank
catalysts.sentence: On March 10, 2026, First Guaranty Bank entered into an agreement with Armstrong Bank, Muskogee, Oklahoma, to sell the Bank's Texas operations, consisting of five branches and related deposits, loans and certain other assets, to Armstrong Bank.
